analysis.reasoning: Core message: China will host COP15 in Kunming and is ready to work with all parties to ensure positive outcomes. Evaluation by narrative: CH1 (West immoral/hostile) – Not present; no criticism of the West. CH2 (China is a benevolent power) – Yes; the tweet emphasizes China's cooperative, multilateral role as host and willingness to work with all parties for a global public good (biodiversity). CH3 (epic history) – Not referenced. CH4 (appropriate political system/values, domestic) – Not addressed; focus is international cooperation, not domestic governance. CH5 (CCP government succeeds) – Not directly; hosting an international conference is not framed as domestic governance success. CH6 (interesting culture/nature) – Indirectly mentions location (Kunming, Yunnan) but does not promote culture/nature; primary message is diplomatic cooperation. Conclusion: The tweet promotes CH2.
